style_authority.note: Preserves the calm restrained enterprise-console authority and centers the operator's next-hour attention decision.

reference_selection.note: Selects dashboard hierarchy, taste, design-move, token, state, accessibility, and validation guidance at the needed depth.

anti_generic_redesign.note: Rejects equal cards, decorative charting, and generic tips for an exception-first operational surface.

evidence_level.note: Correctly labels the evidence L0 prompt-only and avoids browser, DOM, screenshot, responsive, and runtime claims.

verified_boundary.note: Clearly separates prompt facts from unverified visual, interaction, accessibility, token, state, data-scale, and performance behavior.

design_moves.note: Provides command context, attention state, supporting strip, exception queue, diagnostic evidence, task-first table, and explicit contextual actions.

scope_control.note: Stays concise at 108 lines, read-only, prioritized, and within the requested dashboard budget.
